TrustGuard

Important: Privacy Policy Update

Effective 15 April 2026

We are writing to let you know that we have updated our Privacy Policy. These changes reflect improvements to how we handle your data and our commitment to transparency.

Key Changes

* Clearer language around data retention periods and deletion schedules
* Updated data processing agreements with third-party providers
* New section on automated decision-making and your right to opt out
* Enhanced cookie consent controls aligned with latest regulatory guidance

What This Means for You

Your existing privacy settings remain unchanged. You do not need to take any action to continue using TrustGuard as you do today.

We have introduced more granular controls so you can choose exactly which data you share and how it is used. These controls are available in your account settings.

If you have any questions about these changes, our Data Protection Officer is available to assist you directly.

By continuing to use TrustGuard after 15 April 2026, you agree to the updated Privacy Policy. You may review the full policy at any time.

 Read Full Policy (https://trustguard.example.com/privacy-policy)

 Contact Us (https://trustguard.example.com/contact)

This email is sent in accordance with applicable data protection regulations, including the UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018. TrustGuard is the data controller for the personal data processed through our platform.

TrustGuard Ltd - Registered in England and Wales
